question_text: Which of the following is the best example of energy being stored in a chemical store?

options.label: A
options.text: A moving car travelling at constant speed

options.label: B
options.text: A battery inside a torch before it is switched on

options.label: C
options.text: A hot cup of tea cooling down on a table

options.label: D
options.text: A book resting on a high shelf

explanation: A battery contains chemical energy that can be released when the circuit is closed. The moving car has kinetic energy, the hot tea has thermal energy, and the book has gravitational potential energy.
